# Conclusion:


## Limitations:

## Future Work:


## References:
1) 

## Appendix:
1) Github Repository: https://github.com/AnhJoe/Real-Time_IoT_2022_Quantized_Auto_Encoder

## Team Contributions:

Joe Nguyen: 

- Project research, report outline, intro, conclusion

- EDA, MLP baseline

- Proofreading

- Quarto setup, report rendering

Haesung Becker:

- Project research

- GCN + GraphSage

- Proofreading

- Github repo setup

Jared Lyon:

- Evaluation pipeline

- Plots + analysis

- Proofreading

- Github repo cleanup

We worked closely together to recommend datasets and project ideas related to our interests. After initial inspections, we voted and collectively decided on this experiment and its scope.
